en.extract:
The Palau bush warbler (Horornis annae) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Cettiidae.
It is found only in Palau.

The '''Palau bush warbler''' ('''''Horornis annae''''') is a species of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Cettiidae]].
It is found only in [[Palau]].
